news.t: Tradr Launches Leveraged ETFs on Quantum Computing Inc. (QUBT) and Rigetti Computing (RGTI)

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Long QUBT Daily ETF (QUBX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement of Quantum Computing Inc. stock. QUBX was launched on Jun 23, 2025 and is issued by Tradr.

data.title: Tradr Launches Leveraged ETFs on Quantum Computing Inc. (QUBT) and Rigetti Computing (RGTI)
data.text: QUBX, a first-to-market fund, and RGTU offer 2X daily exposure on disruptive quantum computing stocks NEW YORK , June 24, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated...
